summary: Governance schema foundation (G1), transactional approval-merge (G2), and the onboarding access_token invariant fix. These three authored migrations were applied by the Lovable executor as re-timestamped duplicates (recorded in the baseline); this receipt is the authoritative mapping authored-file -> executor-applied-version, with the live verification captured so far.
source_commit_sha_note: Authored across commits on main (G1 3661f86, G2 223207d, token fix 86d7a48).

migrations.executor_applied_note: Lovable re-authored this as 20260722162044_3078029e-*.sql (in baseline appliedVersions).

expected_objects.object: tables data_requirements, data_point_state, data_change_requests, data_audit_log, onboarding_approval_snapshots
expected_objects.evidence: All present live (db_schema inventory 2026-07-22 lists all five; approval_blocked_* + governance tables confirmed via db_select).

expected_objects.object: data_audit_log append-only: RLS = INSERT+SELECT only AND BEFORE UPDATE/DELETE trigger trg_data_audit_log_append_only
expected_objects.evidence: mcp_list_policies(data_audit_log) → only data_audit_log_insert (INSERT) + data_audit_log_select (SELECT). mcp_list_triggers(data_audit_log) → trg_data_audit_log_append_only BEFORE DELETE OR UPDATE EXECUTE data_audit_log_prevent_mutation(). Both layers confirmed 2026-07-22.

expected_objects.object: data_requirements seeded (9 governed-field rows), sensitivity flags correct
expected_objects.evidence: Owner reported 9 catalog rows seeded; independent db_select reconfirm outstanding.

migrations.executor_applied_note: Lovable re-authored this as 20260722162158_bfedce0b-*.sql (in baseline appliedVersions).

expected_objects.object: functions approve_onboarding_transactional, governance_mask_value (data_requirements-driven, fail-closed), governance_record_merge_field; verify_aml_and_approve rewired
expected_objects.evidence: Owner confirmed the three governance functions present + verify_aml_and_approve rewired; governance_mask_value body seen in Lovable's committed 20260722162158 matches intent (fail-closed via data_requirements). Independent mcp_list_functions reconfirm outstanding (MCP token expired mid-pass).
Both columns present live (returned by db_select on 2026-07-22).

migrations.executor_applied_note: Lovable re-authored this as 20260722174336_44bc87e6-*.sql (in baseline appliedVersions). This authored file is now a redundant idempotent duplicate.

expected_objects.object: onboarding_applications.access_token DEFAULT gen_onboarding_access_token() + NOT NULL + BEFORE INSERT trigger trg_ensure_onboarding_access_token + backfill
expected_objects.verify: db_select access_token IS NULL count == 0; catalog for the trigger
expected_objects.evidence: db_select onboarding_applications WHERE access_token IS NULL → 0 rows on 2026-07-22 (incl. rows never manually backfilled), proving the executor backfill ran and new rows get tokens. Trigger definition present in Lovable's applied 20260722174336.

verification_result: partial — G1 append-only + token invariant + governance columns independently confirmed live; G1 catalog seed and G2 function set await independent mcp_list_functions/db_select reconfirm (MCP token expired mid-pass). Do not move to docs/releases/ until all results are pass.
